name: Granola Bars Bw
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Flour, whole wheat or all-purpose
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cream the oil, brown sugar, and molasses together in a bowl.
3. Add the defrosted unsweetened orange juice concentrate.
4. Combine the flour, baking soda, cinnamon, and ginger. Blend into the creamed mixture.
5. Stir in the oats, raisins, apricots, sunflower seeds, wheat germ, and sesame seeds. This makes a very stiff batter.
6. Spread in a greased 9 x 13 pan.
7. Bake about 20-30 minutes or until light brown.
8. Cut into bars. These are more like a dense cake than commercial granola bars.
